enhanced_prompt: A professional, ultra-detailed cinematic shot of a bird actively flying in a abstract environment. Atmosphere: clear weather, captured during natural light. Camera characteristics: static, featuring high speed, captured in 8k resolution, highly detailed textures, masterfully graded color.
negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, noise, grain, text overlay, signature, watermark, deformed anatomy, disfigured limbs, bad lighting, extra fingers, cartoonish if photorealistic, static frames, jittery cuts, low resolution
